anchor: come with a one-sentence rationale that names the bug AND why this form (not the lighter one in Step 4) was the right call
new_content: **Formatter vs. linter discipline.** If CLAUDE.md names a formatter (e.g. `ruff format`) and telemetry shows linter runs (`ruff check`) but no formatter runs after file edits, propose a PostToolUse hook that runs the declared *formatter* on `Write|Edit|MultiEdit`. The rationale must name the formatter (e.g. 'ruff format'), NOT the linter ('ruff check' / 'lint'). Linter errors are symptoms of missing formatting, not the fix.
